transcript: Speaker A: Pooja, you are rejected because your skills are good but your English communication needs improvement. Speaker B: Sir, improve I... Sir umm... Sorry. Speaker B: Anna, OTP 4062. Speaker C: Madam, just 1 minute. Madam, this was actually very easy. It's been only 10 days and now I can see my English has become very fluent these days. Thank you. Speaker B: ನೀವು ಯಾರಿಂದ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [From whom are you learning English?] Speaker C: ಮೇಡಂ, SpeakX ನ AI ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಟೀಚರ್ ಇಂದ. ನಾನು ಆಕ್ಚುಲಿ ಕೆಲಸ ಕಳ್ಕೊಂಬೇಕಾಯ್ತು, ಆದ್ರೆ ಈ ಟೀಚರ್ ಸೇವ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರು. [Madam, from SpeakX's AI English teacher. I was actually about to lose my job, but this teacher saved me.] Speaker B: ನಿಜಾನಾ? [Is it true?] Speaker C: ಹೌದು ಮೇಡಂ. ನಾನು ಫ್ರೀ ಇರ್ಬೇಕಾದ್ರೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ಹತ್ತರಿಂದ ಹದಿನೈದು ನಿಮಿಷ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. ತುಂಬಾ ಸಿಂಪಲ್ ಆಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲ್ಸ್ತಾರೆ. ಚಿಕ್ಕ ಮಕ್ಕಳು ಕೂಡ ಹದಿನೈದು ದಿನದಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಕಲಿಬಹುದು. ಏನಾದ್ರೂ ಮಿಸ್ಟೇಕ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ತಕ್ಷಣ ಸರಿ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ, ಜಡ್ಜ್ ಮಾಡಲ್ಲ. [Yes madam. Whenever I am free, I practice for 10 to 15 minutes daily. They teach English very simply. Even small kids can learn to speak English in 15 days. If you make any mistake, the AI teacher corrects it immediately, without judging.] Speaker B: ಹೌದಾ? ಕಲಿಯೋಕೆ ಎಷ್ಟು ದುಡ್ಡು ಆಗುತ್ತೆ? [Oh really? How much money does it cost to learn?] Speaker C: ಮೇಡಂ, ಜಸ್ಟ್ ಎರಡು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಏಳು ದಿನ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ಇದೆ. [Madam, there is a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees.] Speaker B: ಹೌದಾ, ಅಷ್ಟೇನಾ ಅಣ್ಣ? ಥ್ಯಾಂಕ್ ಯು. ನನ್ ಫೋನ್ ಅಲ್ಲೂ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಡಿ ಪ್ಲೀಸ್. [Really, is that all brother? Thank you. Please download this app on my phone too.]
on_screen_text: Pooja, you are rejected because your skills are good but your English communication needs improvement. Sir, umm... Sorry. Anna OTP 4062. Madam, just 1 minute. Madam this was actually very easy, it's been only 10 days and now I can see my English has become very fluent these days. Thank you. ನೀವು ಯಾರಿಂದ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [From whom are you learning English?] Madam SpeakX na AI English teacher inda [Madam, from SpeakX's AI English teacher] nanu actually kelsa kalkombekaytu [I was actually about to lose my job] adre ee teacher save madidru. [but this teacher saved me.] Nijana? [Is it true?] nanu free irbekadre pratidina hatrinda hadinaidu nimisha practice madtini. [Whenever I am free, I practice for 10 to 15 minutes daily.] Tumba simple agli English kalsitare. [They teach English very simply.] chik makkalu kuda 15 dinadalli English matadakke kalibodu. [Even small kids can learn to speak English in 15 days.] Enadre mistake madidre AI teacher takshana sari madutte judge madalla. [If you make a mistake, the AI teacher corrects it immediately without judging.] Houda, esht dud agutte? [Really, how much money does it cost?] Madam just eradu roopayige elu dina trial ide. [Madam, there is a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees.] Houda, ashtena anna thank you nan phone allu app download madkodi please. [Really, is that all brother? Thank you. Please download this app on my phone too.] Download SpeakX App. Start 7 Days Trial Now.
summary: A woman gets rejected in a job interview over the phone due to poor English skills. A delivery rider overhears her and shares how the SpeakX AI app helped him become fluent in just 10 days. He encourages her to download the app, highlighting its low-cost 7-day trial.
